inputs.label: Conversion Factor (lb/st)
inputs.businessContext: Pounds per stone, default 14 for standard conversion

inputs.label: Additional Pounds
inputs.businessContext: Extra weight in pounds to add to the total

inputs.label: Subtract Pounds
inputs.businessContext: Weight in pounds to subtract from the total

inputs.label: Additional Ounces
inputs.businessContext: Extra weight in ounces to add (16 oz = 1 lb)

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounded output

formulas.roundedPounds: Math.round((stones * adjustmentFactor + additionalWeight - subtractWeight + ounces / 16) * (10 ** precision)) / (10 ** precision)
